mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", reason, return_type as "returnType", total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", current_state as "currentState", created_date as "createdDate" FROM returnrequest WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT current_state as "currentState", count(*) as "totalRefundAmount" FROM returnrequest GROUP BY current_state

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", reason, return_type as "returnType", total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", current_state as "currentState", created_date as "createdDate" FROM returnrequest WHERE current_state IN ('REQUESTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'ITEM_RECEIVED', 'INSPECTED') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM returnrequest WHERE current_state IN ('REQUESTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'ITEM_RECEIVED', 'INSPECTED')

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", reason, return_type as "returnType", total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", current_state as "currentState", created_date as "createdDate" FROM returnrequest WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM returnrequest WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", reason, return_type as "returnType", total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", current_state as "currentState", created_date as "createdDate" FROM returnrequest WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM returnrequest WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
